structured.title: New Testament Exam Prep and Plans
structured.overview: The conversation focused on exam preparation and a few personal updates. The user said they plan to do several mock tests each day, review key scholars and quotes, and feel mostly ready for the upcoming New Testament exam on Wednesday, which is centered on Paul and his letters. They also mentioned having parked an issue with Merrick’s, that Steve understands, and that Rich and the user may try to see them on Friday evening, though that was described as only a possibility. The transcript ends with some garbled, unrelated speech from Rachel that does not add clear context.

action_items.description: Do mock tests for New Testament exam

apps_results.content:
## Preparation Plans
- Do a few mock tests today.
- Review scholars and quotes.
- Feeling mostly prepped.

## Exam Timing
- New Testament exam is Wednesday.
- Quick turnaround to the exam.
- Focus is Paul’s letters.

## Current Understanding
- More familiar with Paul now.
- Less worried than with Ezekiel.
- Issue with Merrick’s is parked.

## People and Updates
- Steve understands the situation.
- Rich may meet them Friday evening.
- Speaker has been away recently.

## Next Steps
- Finish daily mock tests.
- Study Paul’s letters more.
- Possibly meet them Friday evening.
